title: Heltec V3: WiFi station mode and net_if event handling in main.c
description: Implement WiFi station connection logic in lichen/apps/gateway/src/main.c (or new wifi_backhaul.c). Use wifi_mgmt API or net_mgmt events to connect to configured SSID (from Kconfig or /config CoAP), handle NET_EVENT_WIFI_CONNECT_RESULT, NET_EVENT_IPV6_ADDR_ADD, acquire upstream prefix. Register handlers early in main(). Integrate with LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION. Log connection status. Follow AGENTS.md subsystem init order. Update status CBOR to reflect backhaul state. Parent of project-LICHEN-sl32.
notes: Commit: 1c059357f - implemented WiFi station mode, net_mgmt event handler for CONNECT_RESULT/IPV6_ADDR_ADD, backhaul_init before RPL, status CBOR backhaul field (placeholder)
